label: Flesh sacks
description: Spawns flesh sack structures with loot based on site threat points.

sackClumpSize.label: Sack clump size
sackClumpSize.description: Number of cells in the irregular lump of fleshmass generated around each sack.

numFleshSacksFromPoints.label: Num flesh sacks from points
numFleshSacksFromPoints.description: SimpleCurve mapping threat points to the number of flesh sacks to spawn.

forceAtLeastOneShard.label: Force at least one shard
forceAtLeastOneShard.description: When true, the first flesh sack always contains a shard instead of random loot.

spawnSurroundingFleshmass.label: Spawn surrounding fleshmass
spawnSurroundingFleshmass.description: When true, fleshmass edifices are spawned in the clump around each sack.

trySpawnInRoom.label: Try spawn in room
trySpawnInRoom.description: When true, the step attempts to place sacks inside an enclosed room before falling back to open placement.
